calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For An Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Dec. 12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-07-2025 is admitted to probate. Eugene Moy is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May-05-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Continued To Apr-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
